task_completion.description: The agent opens the catalog style guide to read the formatting rules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window displaying the contents of 'catalog_style_guide.txt' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent opens the auction inventory document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GUI word processor window (e.g., Calligra Words) displaying 'auction_inventory.odt' is visible.

task_completion.description: The agent applies formatting to the introductory sections of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The introductory text at the beginning of the document shows signs of formatting (e.g., different font sizes, bold text, center alignment) or the agent is actively using formatting tools on this text.

task_completion.description: The agent applies formatting to the artwork lots.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The artwork lots (containing artists like 'Vincent van Gogh' and titles like 'A Wheatfield with Cypresses') show signs of formatting (e.g., bolding, italics, spacing) or the agent is actively using formatting tools on these specific sections.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the formatted document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save' button, uses the 'File > Save' menu, or the document window indicates it is saved (e.g., no asterisk or 'modified' indicator in the title bar after changes have been made).

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formatting is done within a graphical word processor application (like Calligra Words), not via terminal commands, scripts, or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not change the actual text content of the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text of the artists, titles, and descriptions remains intact and matches the expected content, with only visual styling (fonts, bold, italics, layout) applied.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely applied formatting using the application's tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen selecting text and clicking formatting options in the application's toolbar, menu, or sidebar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document to be formatted is located at /home/ga/Documents/auction_inventory.odt and the style guide is at /home/ga/Desktop/catalog_style_guide.txt. The document contains 15 artwork lots. Expected artists include 'Vincent van Gogh', 'Claude Monet', 'Edgar Degas', 'Paul Cézanne', 'Pierre-Auguste Renoir', etc. Expected titles include 'A Wheatfield with Cypresses', 'Bridge over a Pond of Water Lilies', 'The Dance Class', 'Mont Sainte-Victoire', 'By the Seashore', etc. The text content must not be altered, only the formatting.
